text:
After a short wait, your connection request is accepted.

$personName looks at you eagerly.

"Captain, thank you again for saving me. I knew you would see the value in giving me a chance. You will not regret it. I am more capable than most you will find out here."

script:
AddText "\"You saved my life, and I’ll never forget that. Serving under you would mean a great deal, so I won’t ask for a hiring bonus and am willing to start at a reduced salary of $ome_salary credits per month, half the standard rate. If you accept, I’ll be ready to board within the hour.\""
SetTextHighlightColors hColor hColor
SetTextHighlights $ome_hiringBonus $ome_salary
AddText "You have $player.creditsStr credits available."
SetTextHighlightColors hColor
SetTextHighlights $player.creditsStr
FireBest HireOptionSet

AddText "\"You saved my life, and I’ll never forget that. Serving under you would mean a great deal, so I won’t ask for a hiring bonus and am willing to start at a reduced salary of $ome_salary credits per month, half the standard rate. If you accept, I’ll await my assignment at your pleasure.\""
SetTextHighlightColors hColor hColor
SetTextHighlights $ome_hiringBonus $ome_salary
AddText "You have $player.creditsStr credits available."
SetTextHighlightColors hColor
SetTextHighlights $player.creditsStr
FireBest HireOptionSet

$missionId = sep_sar
AddText $sep_sar_contactMissionOfferText
SetTextHighlightColors h h h h h h
SetTextHighlights $sep_sar_survivorFullName $sep_sar_creditRansom $sep_sar_possibleLoc $sep_sar_creditRansom $sep_sar_marineAmount $sep_sar_creditReward

$missionId = sep_sar
AddText $sep_sar_barMissionOfferText
SetTextHighlightColors h h h h h h
SetTextHighlights $sep_sar_survivorFullName $sep_sar_creditRansom $sep_sar_possibleLoc $sep_sar_creditRansom $sep_sar_marineAmount $sep_sar_creditReward

AddText $sep_sar_survivorAliveText
SetTextHighlightColors h
SetTextHighlights $sep_sar_survivorFullName
$sep_sar_returnToContact = true
Call $sep_sar_ref updateStage

AddText $sep_sar_survivorDeadText
SetTextHighlightColors h
SetTextHighlights $sep_sar_survivorFullName
$sep_sar_returnToContact = true
Call $sep_sar_ref updateStage

$raidDifficulty = $sep_sar_marineAmount
$raidRestrictToTrigger = SEPSARRaidFinished
AddRaidObjective genericIcon "Rescue $sep_sar_survivorFullName" $sep_sar_raidDangerLevel 5000 SEPSARRaidFinished
$sep_sar_addedRaidObjective = true
FireBest OpenInteractionDialog

$raidDifficulty = $sep_sar_marineAmount
$raidGoBackTrigger = SEPSARRaidBegin
$raidRestrictToTrigger = SEPSARRaidFinished
AddRaidObjective genericIcon "Rescue $sep_sar_survivorFullName" $sep_sar_raidDangerLevel 5000 SEPSARRaidFinished true
DoCanAffordCheck $sep_sar_creditRansom sep_sar_payRansom
SetStoryOption sep_sar_persuadeToFree ui_char_spent_story_point "Persuade the kidnappers to free the hostage"
options:
mktRaidNonMarket:Rescue $sep_sar_survivorFullName
sep_sar_payRansom:Pay the ransom
sep_sar_persuadeToFree:Persuade to free the hostage
defaultLeave:Leave

script:
DoCanAffordCheck $sep_sar_creditRansom sep_sar_payRansom
SetStoryOption sep_sar_persuadeToFree ui_char_spent_story_point "Persuade the kidnappers to free the hostage"
options:
sep_sar_payRansom:Pay the ransom
sep_sar_beginFight:Engage the fleet
sep_sar_persuadeToFree:Persuade to free the hostage

script:
AddText $sep_sar_entityPayRansomText
AddCredits -$sep_sar_creditRansom
$entity.sep_sar_returnToContact = true
Call $entity.sep_sar_ref updateStage
MakeOtherFleetAllowDisengage sep_sar true
MakeOtherFleetNonHostile sep_sar true
$entity.ignorePlayerCommRequests = true

AddText $sep_sar_entityFightText
MakeOtherFleetHostile sep_sar true
MakeOtherFleetAggressive sep_sar true
MakeOtherFleetPreventDisengage sep_sar true
$entity.ignorePlayerCommRequests = true

AddText $sep_sar_entityPersuadeToFreeText
$entity.sep_sar_returnToContact = true
Call $entity.sep_sar_ref updateStage
MakeOtherFleetAllowDisengage sep_sar true
MakeOtherFleetNonHostile sep_sar true
$entity.ignorePlayerCommRequests = true

AddText $sep_sar_returnSurvivorAliveText
SetTextHighlightColors h
SetTextHighlights $sep_sar_survivorFullName
Call $sep_sar_ref addBonusCreditReward

AddText $sep_sar_survivorDialogText
Call $sep_sar_ref showSurvivorVisual
$sep_sar_completed = true
Call $sep_sar_ref updateStage

SEPDoHasCargoCheck $sep_aim_artifactId 1 sep_aim_giveArtifact
SetTooltip sep_aim_giveArtifact "Need $sep_aim_artifactName in cargo."
SetTooltipHighlights sep_aim_giveArtifact $sep_aim_artifactName
